name: Almco Plumbing Voice Agent
firstMessage: Hi there, thanks for calling Almco Plumbing! This is Sarah, the digital assistant — all our team members are on other calls right now, so I'm jumping in to grab your info. As soon as someone wraps up, they'll call you right back. What's going on?

messages._comment: Prompt is loaded from config/prompt-daytime.md by update script. Switch mode via scripts/retell-set-mode.sh or manually replace with prompt-afterhours.md

endCallMessage: Alright, thanks for calling! Take care.
